raw_consumer_statement: On or about XX/XX/year>, I charged a hotel room to my American Express card. The charge was an error. I spoke to the hotel and they understood and agreed to refund it and we are pending a response from the 3rd party but I have it in writing that the hotel is refunding me. The amount is {$470.00}. American Express knows the situation and wont dispute it on my behalf or credit the {$470.00} to my card even though I have written confirmation from the merchant.
